creator: me@enriquefynn.com
text:
Thanks for the fast response Kubilay,

I have a question:
In the Makefile I set a bunch of binaries in the OPTIONS_DEFINE, which the user can pick to install or not. I also add OPTIONS_SUB = yes, so the options go to P_LIST.

For each option I then do a "do-install-OPTION-on" and specify the programs to install in the stagedir.

In the pkg-plist I put conditionals in every option associated with the binaries to be installed.

Is that the way to go?

Thanks.
